info.name: LMS B2B diBimbing - GraphQL
info.description:
Koleksi GraphQL LMS B2B diBimbing.

Endpoint: {{baseURL}}
Auth lapis 1: HTTP Basic ({{basicUser}}/{{basicPass}}) di level koleksi.
Auth lapis 2: jalankan 'Auth > Login' atau 'Login Super Admin' -> session cookie otomatis tersimpan oleh Postman cookie jar.

Isi variabel di tab 'Variables' atau Environment sebelum dipakai.

graphql.query: query Ping { ping }

exec: if (u) { pm.collectionVariables.set('companyId', u.companyId || pm.collectionVariables.get('companyId')); console.log('Logged in as', u.email); }

graphql.query: mutation Logout { logout }

graphql.variables:
{
  "input": {
    "title": "Data Analytics Batch 5",
    "descriptions": "Bootcamp 3 bulan",
    "angkatanId": 5,
    "divisionId": "{{divisionId}}",
    "enrollmentKey": "DA-2026",
    "startedAt": "2026-07-01",
    "finishedAt": "2026-09-30",
    "attendancePercentage": 20,
    "attendancePercentageToggle": true,
    "finalProjectPercentage": 50,
    "finalProjectPercentageToggle": true,
    "isAllFinproRequired": true
  }
}

{
  "input": {
    "bootcampId": "{{bootcampId}}",
    "title": "Sesi 1 - Intro to SQL",
    "descriptions": "...",
    "liveClassTime": "2026-07-02T09:00:00.000Z",
    "liveClassDuration": 120,
    "zoomUrl": "https://zoom.us/j/123",
    "isAttendanceCounted": true,
    "enableCheckIn": true,
    "checkInKey": "MASUK01",
    "enableCheckOut": true,
    "checkOutKey": "PULANG01"
  }
}

graphql.query: query Storage { availableStorage { usedStorage maxStorage } }
